title: Introduction to Command Blocks
description: Learn to use command blocks for automation

content.text:
Command Blocks

Command blocks allow you to run commands automatically. They're powerful tools for creating custom experiences.

Getting Command Blocks:

  • Enable cheats in your world
  • Use the command: /give @s command_block
  • Place the command block
  • Right-click to open its interface

Basic Commands:

  • /give - Give items to players
  • /tp - Teleport players
  • /setblock - Place blocks
  • /fill - Fill areas with blocks
  • /say - Send messages

Command Block Types:

  • Impulse - Runs once when activated
  • Chain - Runs after the previous block
  • Repeat - Runs continuously
content.task: Place a command block and use the /say command to display a message when activated.
